message:
test(artifacts): add artifact-index path cross-validation tests (DISC-019 / GAP-3)

Adds § 14 to the E2E artifact schema validation suite: cross-validation
between artifact index records and the filesystem. These tests exercise
the `validate_artifact_index_paths()` function (referenced by DISC-019 /
GAP-3 / bd-z5vt4) which detects orphaned artifact references — records
in the JSONL artifact index whose referenced files don't exist on disk.

Test coverage:
- artifact_index_cross_validation_detects_missing_paths:
  Creates one existing and one non-existent file, verifies exactly
  one warning returned for the missing path
- artifact_index_cross_validation_passes_when_all_paths_exist:
  Creates all referenced files, verifies zero warnings
- artifact_index_cross_validation_handles_relative_paths:
  Verifies that relative paths in artifact records are resolved
  against the provided artifact_dir
- artifact_index_cross_validation_warns_on_missing_relative_path:
  Relative path that doesn't exist produces a warning with correct
  name, path, and line number
- artifact_index_cross_validation_skips_non_artifact_records:
  JSONL lines with schema != pi.test.artifact.v1 are ignored,
  only artifact records trigger filesystem checks

All tests use tempfile::tempdir() for isolated, deterministic
filesystem state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
